title: No Item Swap Animation
description: Removes the annoying item swap animation when switching between hotbar slots. Items now appear instantly at full height instead of slowly sliding up from the bottom of the screen.
body:
Removes the annoying item swap animation when switching between hotbar slots. Items now appear instantly at full height instead of slowly sliding up from the bottom of the screen.

Perfect for PvP, speedrunning, or anyone who wants snappier, more responsive gameplay.

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac0bf562a992eb02c9390bd68f5fd9d65c431641.gif)

(demo)
